meaning: vt.满足,使满意,说服,使相信v.满意,确保
examples: We cannot satisfy demand for the product.
The proposed plan will not satisfy everyone.
His answer did not satisfy my curiosity at all.
Mr. Marcus wouldn't say how much they must spend to satisfy the debt with its creditors.
Profits evidence efficient stewardship of capital in ways which satisfy the market and generate wealth.
